name: Recur Post
description:
Efficiency is Recur Post’s middle name. Known for its content scheduling and recycling capabilities, the platform allows users to efficiently manage their social media presence. It’s especially great for small teams and solo operators, with time-saving features like automated content posting and post recycling. 

Here’s what people love:

  • There’s a plan for everyone, with a free plan boasting impressive features and premium plans starting at $20.83/month
  • Have a post you want to reoccur? Recur Post does that automatically (it’s literally in the name). With the content recycling feature, you can automatically re-use your best-performing posts
  • Advanced scheduling tools help you plan and schedule posts across multiple platforms
  • Become a post master with content curation abilities. Discover and share relevant content to keep your followers engaged, all on the platform
  • Supported platforms include: Facebook, X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Google, and Instagram.

Key Features:

✅   Automated posting

✅   Content recycling

✅  Multi-platform scheduling
what_people_say:
What people say :

Beloved by small teams, Recur Post is like having a personal assistant to help you with post creation. Users especially appreciate its user-friendly interface, so anyone on your team can jump in to help. 

Here’s what people say about it:

“Recur Post makes content management so much easier, especially with recycling posts. The analytics are just okay, but for the price we’re not complaining.”

“It’s great for maintaining a consistent online presence, but I wish it had more features for direct audience engagement.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Advanced analytics
  • 🚫 Audience engagement
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
  • 🚫 Social inbox
